/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC   -shared -Wl,-soname,libgtest_main.so -o libgtest_main.so CMakeFiles/gtest_main.dir/gtest_main_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gtest_main.dir/src/gtest_main.cc.o   -L/usr/lib/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/lib/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu:/home/pi/ros_catkin_ws/build_isolated/rviz/gtest/googlemock/gtest libgtest.so -lpthread
